race.comment: THE REAL MAN (3) had first try this circuit last time and beat all but Star Territory, who was in the previous race. In great form for the new Tassie yard and can find winning form again here off the slightly better draw. NUNKERI (7) got off the mark with a maiden win here last time, leading throughout. Expected to give a sight again. STAR FORTIAN (10) wasn't far away fresh and will strip fitter. Drawn better and worth noting maiden win was here. CALIFORNIA FLYER (6) raced on speed and faded last time but is better than that. Worth another chance. WILD NIGHTS (12) rates highly on her best performances and can bounce back.
